title: SC Central High Layouts + Giveaway
excerpt: A bit tardy on posting my layouts for Studio Calico's September kits, sorry! Partially due to a rather hectic schedule of traveling throughout Australia and New Zealand with a number of store visits each day, dinner meetings, and lack of…
body:
A bit tardy on posting my layouts for Studio Calico's September kits, sorry! Partially due to a rather hectic schedule of traveling throughout Australia and New Zealand with a number of store visits each day, dinner meetings, and lack of reliable wi-fi, it is just now that I am able to share this with you. Apologies for the delay. Here is my layout using only the main kit, Central High.

This page came together incredibly quickly thanks to the patterned paper with the "layers" printed onto it already. This month I got Add-On's #1, #2, and #4.Here's a layout I made using only Add-On #1 Style Guide. This add-on kit has tons of my new products that aren't available anywhere else yet!

I mixed up the main + Add-On #2 Capital Avenue and Add-On #4 The Register to make the rest of these pages.

You can see my entire gallery here. How about a giveaway of Add-On #1, Style Guide?GIVEAWAY NOW CLOSED: Leave a comment and let me know which layout you like best from above, OR what your current favorite technique is. Comments will close Wednesday, September 5 at 7am PST and a winner will be chosen shortly after. As usual, internationals welcome. Good luck!

UPDATED 9.5 : WINNER IS: Cassi says: September 3, 2012 at 2:13 pm (Edit)

I love your “meet me in the sunshine” layout. Including maps is on the top of my list right now because I am making lots of travel mini books. Thanks for all these great ideas. I can’t get enough of the wood grain chevrons, and the stitched sun rays have me so inspired!
